ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the publication */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the publication */,
  "publication_year" TEXT /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number (if applicable) */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number (if applicable) */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, technical report) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publication_type FOREIGN KEY ("publication_type") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., institution or organization) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publisher's journals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of publication */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type (e.g., Journal Article, Conference Paper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  "is_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication type is peer-reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the citation record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citing publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., textual, data, software) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication where collaboration occurred */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the collaboration (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (author or expert) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the review */,
  "reviewer_role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., peer, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the institution was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the publication (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the publication was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliated institution */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword entry */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with a publication */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated publication */,
  "weight" REAL /* Importance of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received for the publication */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the funding */,
  "funding_period" TEXT /* Period during which the funding was provided */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
